api: PostgreSQL wire protocol (libpq via pgx) — not a REST API
scope: This is a database connector: it speaks the PostgreSQL wire protocol over a pgx connection, not HTTP/REST. There is no REST endpoint surface to enumerate — Check/Catalog/Read are implemented as SQL queries (information_schema discovery, snapshot SELECT) against whatever tables/columns the target database exposes, which are discovered dynamically at runtime (capabilities.dynamic_schema: true) rather than declared as a fixed set of streams/endpoints. This api_surface.json intentionally has zero endpoints entries: there is nothing REST-shaped for either covered_by or excluded to describe, per the minimal-db surface pattern for Tier-3 SQL/CDC connectors (design §B.7).
